title: How Dashboards Work in monday: An Overview Tutorial for Teams
excerpt:
Dashboards in monday.com are powerful for real-time visibility - but when it comes to deeper analysis, many teams need more flexibility. 
We’ve put together a tutorial on how to extend dashboards with a spreadsheet layer…

posts.author: kkovriga (Katerina Kovriga)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dashboards in monday.com are powerful for real-time visibility - but when it comes to deeper analysis, many teams need more flexibility.

We’ve put together a tutorial on how to extend dashboards with a spreadsheet layer using Smart Spreadsheet.

In this guide, you’ll learn how to:
• Import reference Excel data (rates, budgets)
• Connect board data into a unified dataset
• Run advanced calculations using formulas
• Build pivot tables and charts in one widget
• Turn dashboards into interactive workspaces

Includes a simple, real-life example you can replicate.

Check out the full tutorial: How Dashboards Work in monday: An Overview Tutorial for Teams - Stiltsoft
